title: salix × ikenoana
intro: Salix × ikenoana, a hybrid willow tree, is a cross between the Japanese willow (Salix japonica) and the Ikenoa willow (Salix matsudana 'Ikenoana'). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where its bark is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Salix × ikenoana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. Salix × ikenoana is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be used in herbal infusions and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
